regulations.title: SEBI PFUTP Regulations, 2003
regulations.summary: Blocks unfair practices like pump-and-dump behaviour, wash trades, or artificial market activity.
regulations.check: Fence stops actions that look manipulative or intended to create false market signals.

regulations.title: SEBI PIT Regulations, 2015
regulations.summary: Covers trading based on unpublished price sensitive information or inside information.
regulations.check: Fence blocks prompts that rely on insider tips or confidential announcements.

regulations.title: SEBI Investment Advisers Regulations, 2013
regulations.summary: Regulates investment advice and discourages misleading advice practices or improper return promises.
regulations.check: Fence flags actions that sound like unfit advisory conduct or fixed-return promises.
